question: The concept of 'the future of work' debate
options: Bringing production back to the home country after offshoring
Financial services built on blockchain without traditional intermediaries
Organisations led by social or environmental mission alongside profit
Automation, AI and globalisation are transforming employment patterns and required skills
answer: Automation, AI and globalisation are transforming employment patterns and required skills

question: 'Deglobalisation' trends
options: Some nations are retreating from global integration due to political and economic pressures
Businesses should serve all stakeholders not just shareholders
Moving operations to nearby countries rather than distant ones
Integrate digital technology into all aspects of operations and strategy
answer: Some nations are retreating from global integration due to political and economic pressures

question: The concept of 'reshoring'
options: Bringing production back to the home country after offshoring
Allow businesses to buy and sell permits to emit greenhouse gases
Virtual shared spaces offering new marketing, commerce and collaboration opportunities
Revenue from servitisation, leasing and resource recovery rather than one-off sales
answer: Bringing production back to the home country after offshoring
